name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: ''
labels: ''

---

## 🚀 Feature Request

### 📌 Problem Statement

Describe the problem clearly.

* What is missing?
* What limitation are you facing?
* Why is this a problem?

---

### 💡 Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you want.

* What should be added or improved?
* How should it work?
* What will the user experience look like?

---

### 🧠 Use Case

Explain where this feature is useful.

* Who will use it? (Farmer, developer, admin)
* In what scenario?

---

### 🔧 Affected Area

Select one or more:

* [ ] Frontend (UI/UX)
* [ ] Backend API
* [ ] ML Model / Prediction
* [ ] Dataset
* [ ] Documentation

---

### 🔄 Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative approaches you thought about.

* Why were they not suitable?

---

### 📊 Example (if applicable)

Provide sample input/output or flow:

```json id="s9wz2q"
{
  "example": "Explain how the feature should behave"
}
```

---

### 📸 Additional Context

* Screenshots / references
* Links to similar features (if any)

---

### ⚠️ Checklist

* [ ] This feature is clearly defined
* [ ] It solves a real problem
* [ ] It aligns with the project scope
